higher_order_mass_map_frontier.higher_order_question: Compute the effective quartic/Yoneda-Massey/A-infinity mass tensor with singlet vevs in H1(e3-e2) and H1(e4-e0), then project the triplet and doublet Wilson-line component blocks.
minimal_engine_requirements: construct equivariant Koszul/Cech representatives for the four H1 legs
implement multiplication plus homotopy/projection in the Koszul total complex
evaluate the order-4 effective product or equivalent Massey/Yoneda representative
insert singlet vev directions in the even invariant component of H1(e3-e2) x H1(e4-e0)
compute the resulting 1x1 triplet block and confirm the doublet block remains zero
higher_order_mass_map_frontier.ordinary_cup_reason: Four H1 factors would land in H4(O_X) under the ordinary cup product, while a CY3 superpotential integral is controlled by H3(O_X).
